instructionalDaysDescription: MySchoolDates calculated this count from the published OUSD calendar by excluding listed weekday holidays, professional development days, collaboration/work days, teacher work days, and breaks between August 10, 2026 and May 27, 2027.
seoTitle: Oakland Unified School District Calendar 2026-2027 (OUSD) | Holidays, PDF & ICS
seoDescription: View the OUSD 2026-2027 calendar verified against the official district PDF, with Aug 10 first day, May 27 last day, holidays, breaks, printable PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: OUSD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 10, 2026 and ends instruction on May 27, 2027. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 4, and Spring Break runs March 29-April 2. January 5 is a professional development day before students begin the spring semester on January 6.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Oakland Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Oakland Unified students start school on Monday, August 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is OUSD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the OUSD 2026-2027 calendar runs Monday, March 29 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for OUSD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of instruction for Oakland Unified is Thursday, May 27, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is OUSD Winter Break in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Monday, January 4, 2027. January 5 is a professional development day, and students begin the spring semester on January 6.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Calculated from the official OUSD calendar after excluding listed weekday no-school days and breaks.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: The first day moves one day earlier than the 2025-2026 school year.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: OUSD's 2027 Spring Break falls the week immediately after Farmworkers Day.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 11 in 2025-2026 to August 10 in 2026-2027.
Spring Break moves from April 6-10 in 2026 to March 29-April 2 in 2027.
OUSD lists Farmworkers Day (in lieu) on March 26, 2027, immediately before Spring Break.

customSections.label: OUSD Calendar Planning Numbers
customSections.content: These 2026-2027 figures add context to the Oakland Unified calendar without repeating the main date cards. They are meant for family logistics, not as a substitute for the official PDF.

groups.label: 2026-2027 planning numbers
items: 2 semester start dates: August 10, 2026 for the fall term and January 6, 2027 after Winter Break and a professional development day.
3 long recess windows: Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break create the largest childcare and travel planning blocks.
3 standalone no-school weekdays before Spring Break: Professional Development Day, Indigenous Peoples' Day, and Veterans Day appear outside the major break periods.
1 transportation checkpoint before school starts: OUSD lists July 5, 2026 as the transportation registration deadline for the 2026-2027 year.
80+ schools and programs: districtwide dates are a starting point, but school-level calendars still matter for bell schedules, orientations, athletics, and ceremonies.

events.name: Indigenous Peoples' Day
events.description: Observed in lieu of Lincoln's Birthday.
